title: Module 1 knowledge check
markdown: Five questions on programs, REPL vs scripts, and print. Unlimited attempts.

choices: An interactive prompt where you type code and see results immediately
Only a way to install Python
A type of loop that never ends

questions.prompt: A .py file is a script you can run with python3 hello.py (or python hello.py on some systems).
What is the role of a line that starts with # in Python?
choices: It is a comment ignored by Python
It prints the rest of the line

questions.prompt: You want to try one line of Python with no file. The best first option in this course is:
choices: Use an online Python 3 interpreter or the local REPL
Buy a paid IDE license first
Install a third-party package manager before any code

questions.prompt: It is safe to paste API keys and passwords into a free online Python interpreter.
